commit.message:
Fix toolbar About button not appearing

AddAction's 4th arg is toolTipText (invisible), 5th is the visible
text label. "About" was only passed as the tooltip so the button
rendered with no icon and no text. Pass it for both args.

commit.message:
Fix bugs from 5-agent audit: colors, FK constraints, copy, data flow

Dashboard: LEVEL_COLORS were Tailwind classes used in CSS style attributes,
producing invisible borders/backgrounds. Added LEVEL_HEX map with actual
hex values for all inline styles. Removed unused RPGMap import. Fixed
division-by-zero guard on progress bar. Fixed level-up flash to use
correct per-level color.

Badge SVG: level number showed 0-4 instead of 1-5. Colors for Accelerator
and Agentic were swapped vs. the rest of the app.

Storage: deleteUser and resetUserProgress now delete coachConversations
and challengeReflections before nudges, preventing FK constraint crashes.

Results page: legacy assessments (no outcomeOptions) now show firstMove
content in the action phase instead of a blank card. Removed cosmetic
time picker that was never sent to server. Fixed toast to match what
actually gets saved. Removed unused useCallback import.

Routes: signature skill and first challenge lookups now fall back to
case-insensitive matching, preventing silent data loss when AI returns
slightly different casing.

Landing page: "10 minutes" changed to "5 minutes".
Warmup page: deduplicated intro copy.
Challenge coach: removed unused ScrollArea import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(v2.0): major landing page refurbishment + AI update sync system

GSD Planning:
- Updated .planning/PROJECT.md, STATE.md, ROADMAP.md for v2.0 milestone
- Design system generated via ui-ux-pro-max skill, persisted to design-system/genfy/MASTER.md

AI Update Sync System:
- scripts/sync-updates.mjs: fetches commits from both repos, uses GPT-4 Mini to generate human-readable changelog, writes data/updates.json
- .github/workflows/sync-updates.yml: daily cron (9am UTC) + manual dispatch trigger
- data/updates.json: initial seeded changelog data
- RecentUpdates.tsx: now reads from static JSON instead of hardcoded array, with type-based icons

Landing Page Refurbishment:
- Hero: ecosystem framing, stats row (50k+ videos, 4 engines, 10+ platforms), secondary CTA
- Features: expanded with 8 real features from nexusvideogenerator (TikTok Shop, Gallery, GPT prompts)
- NEW AIModels: 4 engine cards (Genfy Engine/Ultra/Prime/Advanced) with quality/speed/cost specs
- NEW Platform: Studio, Gallery, Hub, Marketplace, Community, Social — full ecosystem overview
- NEW TargetUsers: 5 user personas with gradient icons
- Pricing: corrected to token packages (not monthly subscriptions), Business tier (50k+), token cost explainer
- HowItWorks: updated copy (Upload → Generate → Publish)
- CallToAction: dual CTAs (Get Started + Explore Platform)
- Navbar: added Motores IA + Plataforma anchor links
- Footer: 5-column layout with new Platform section links
- i18n: complete EN + PT translations for all new sections

commit.message:
feat(regime): complete P1 adaptive switching — SMC overlay + volatility guard

P1.1 — detect_market_regime(): when smc_strategy is warmed up, call
  analyze_with_smc(df, smc_ctx) instead of analyze(df) so ACCUMULATION /
  DISTRIBUTION phases detected by CHoCH are reflected in live routing.
  Falls back to analyze(df) when SMC context is absent or not yet warmed up.

P1.3 — _update_active_strategies(): add volatility guard that blocks strategy
  expansion (adding new strategies) when atr_pct > _MAX_VOLATILITY_ATR_PCT (3%).
  Reductions (deactivations) always pass so open positions are still managed.
  New class constant: BotOrchestrator._MAX_VOLATILITY_ATR_PCT = 3.0

Tests: 4 new tests in test_market_regime.py (78 total, all passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(canvas): defensive animation variety — stat-driven blocks and dodges (#157)

Add visual variety to defensive actions (previously identical every time):
- Block absorption: initial push-back that decays (absorbing impact). Weak
  blockers pushed back more (1/defMod scaling on lean and knee bend).
- Block guard-drop: fast fighters drop guard quicker (spdMod power curve)
- Dodge style by speed stat: speed fighters lean back (POSE_DODGE_LEAN),
  power fighters duck (POSE_DODGE_DUCK). Threshold at spdMod > 1.05.
- Dodge snap-in: first 15% of dodge snaps into pose with speed-driven timing
- Dodge recovery: fast fighters recover from dodge quicker (spdMod power curve)
- Body lean amplification (leanStrMod) applied to dodge hold phase

3 files changed (constants.ts, index.ts, fighter-renderer.ts).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): replace is_empty() with assert_ne! on static str constants

clippy::const_is_empty fires on `!constant.is_empty()` since the result
is always known at compile time. Use assert_ne!(constant, "") instead.

Migrate OAuth flow to @supabase/ssr to fix PKCE verifier storage

@supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs cannot properly persist the PKCE verifier
through cross-origin OAuth redirects. @supabase/ssr handles this correctly
as recommended in the Supabase error message.

commit.message:
fix(ui-server): correct source map line offset in Bun plugin [#912] (#919)

The plugin prepends CSS import and Fast Refresh preamble lines before
the compiled code, but the source map was not adjusted for these extra
lines. Breakpoints in browser DevTools were landing 2-3 lines below
the intended position.

Fix: offset the source map mappings by prepending empty line entries
(';' characters) for each prepended line, so the mappings align with
the compiled code's actual position in the final output.

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: 5 MUST-fixes — hard build, healthcheck, version pin, skills troubleshooting

1. Dockerfile.gateway: removed || true from build step, uses `pnpm run build`
   (hard fail). Added version check: refuses build if < v2026.2.25 (ClawJacked).

2. openclaw.json allowlist: verified — account-level dmPolicy="allowlist" +
   numeric allowFrom=[7381250590]. Channel-level pairing is overridden.

3. Healthcheck: docker-compose uses JSON grep (not simple curl 200).
   doctor.sh detects HTML-instead-of-JSON /health responses.

4. Skills troubleshooting: expanded docs with 5-step debug flow for missing
   skills, full restart requirement, fallback ~/.openclaw/skills copy.

5. Security: pinned submodule to v2026.3.2, added version pinning + supply
   chain section to SECURITY.md. No marketplace skills, read-only mounts.

commit.message:
feat(mobile): add AI Market Brief section to Daily Brief screen

Slots the new /api/market/brief/ response into the existing DailyBriefScreen
between the market summary and suggested action sections.

- MarketBrief interface: regime, top_bullish, top_bearish, narrative
- Non-blocking parallel fetch — market brief loads after the daily brief
  without delaying the screen or blocking on failure
- Section only appears when data is available (graceful no-op if backend
  is unreachable or model not yet trained)
- Regime pill with colour-coded background (Expansion=green,
  Parabolic=amber, Deflation=indigo, Crisis=red)
- Top bullish / bearish tickers with confidence badge + first reason
- Matches existing section card styles exactly
